text:
module_register_init: MOD_LOAD (xfs_syscall, c014e22c, 0xc0dc2920) error 17
xfs: cdev: 128, syscall: 210


Fatal trap 12: page fault while in kernel mode
fault virtual address   = 0x0
fault code              = supervisor read, page not present
instruction pointer     = 0x8:0x0
stack pointer           = 0x10:0xc4169f30
frame pointer           = 0x10:0xc4169fa0
code segment            = base 0x0, limit 0xfffff, type 0x1b
                        = DPL 0, pres 1, def32 1, gran 1
processor eflags        = interrupt enabled, resume, IOPL = 0
current process         = 12932 (arlad)
interrupt mask          = none
trap number             = 12
panic: page fault

How-To-Repeat: With a "clean" build (makeworld and makeinstall)
re-make and re-install arla-0.34.6, then (as root)
run "startarla" from /usr/local/bin

My AFS cell configuration is unchanged from a working
version from 4.2-STABLE
